summary: Iter 177 Labour Law Compliance Reports Module + Part 1 role separation tested end-to-end. Backend: 36/36 pytest passed — catalogue returns 22 reports; all 22 report_keys generate 200 JSON (Kankani cmp_527fecdd7c, month 2026-06); pdf export has valid %PDF magic (>4KB), excel export valid PK zip, csv exports have proper headers; gender filter reduces rows monotonically; explicit from/to range honoured; >62-day range returns 400; unknown report_key returns 400; missing company_id / month+dates returns 400; verify endpoint round-trip works publicly (no auth) and unknown verify_id returns 404. Frontend: /labour-reports screen loads for super admin; chips grouped into Registers/Daily Reports/Shift Reports/Technology Reports (all 22 visible); selecting Muster Roll + lr-month=2026-06 + Generate produces preview card with table (126 rows Kankani) and 'Verify: lrv_...' meta; CSV export triggered with no error state; left-shell 'Labour Law Reports' link is present and highlighted (see screenshot). Part 1 (role separation): Super admin dashboard shows NO hero-shift card and admin-brand-center IS present. Employee TNF40186C dashboard shows hero-shift + tab-punch present (iter176 view-only pill also correctly renders because the firm has attendance_punching_enabled=false — sticky CTAs hidden). Company admin scenario for 403 + row-my-attendance NOT executable (no working company_admin credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md — Prakash Kankani PIN/password unknown per doc line 49).

issues: Console noise: repeated warnings 'shadow* style props deprecated. Use boxShadow', invalid 'outline'/'background'/'padding shorthand' style property errors. Not blocking but should be cleaned up.
High volume of 429 'Too Many Requests' from repeated polling after login. Likely /messages/unread-count or /attendance/today live-sync loop. Investigate rate-limit / dedupe.

action_items: Optional: seed a company_admin test account (Kankani or fresh firm) in /app/memory/test_credentials.md so the cross-firm 403 case and the 'My Attendance (Employee Mode)' quick-action / attendance title='My Attendance' can be verified end-to-end.
Investigate 429 storm on employee dashboard after login — appears to hit /messages/unread-count / /attendance/today loop.
Clean up web-only style prop warnings (shadow*, outline, background, padding shorthand).
critical_code_review_comments: labour_reports.py: solid single-engine design. QR verification stored server-side. Filters correctly narrow the employee master; report builders keyed off a shared _day_summary — good DRY.
labour-reports.tsx: web download flow uses browser Blob + revokeObjectURL — clean. Native fallback missing but not required for web preview.

Dashboard hero card & Punch tab correctly gated behind user.role === 'employee'. row-my-attendance appears for company_admin/sub_admin only (Part 1 satisfied by code inspection). Attendance screen title switches to 'My Attendance' for non-employees.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% (labour-reports UI + super/employee role separation verified; company_admin cases untested due to missing creds)

seed_data_creation: None. Report verification docs (lrv_*) intentionally left in db.report_verifications per request.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite /app/backend/tests/test_iter177_labour_reports.py is a fast (~8s) regression covering all 22 report keys, 3 file formats, filter behaviour, range validation, error paths, and QR verify endpoint. Super admin session_token key = 'session_token' (login endpoint /api/auth/admin-password-login). Frontend web shell exposes 'Labour Law Reports' link under Reports side-nav.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found for this iteration.
